title: EMP DNA Extraction Protocol
author: Donna Berg-Lyons
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.nutdewn
materials: Pipet samples “up and down” to mix.

steps.title: BEFORE THE FIRST USE ONLY, Solution C5-D must be prepared
steps.instruction: BEFORE THE FIRST USE ONLY, Solution C5-D must be prepared. Add an equal amount of 100% Ethanol to Solution C5-D (for the 4 prep kit = 120 ml, or for the 12 prep kit = 360 ml). Mix well. Put a check mark in the “ethanol added” box on the bottle cap label.

steps.title: Centrifuge Bead Plate for 1 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Bead Plate for 1 min at 2500 x g to pellet the beads. 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove the Square Well Mat from...
steps.instruction: Remove the Square Well Mat from the PowerSoil®-htp Bead Plate and set aside.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 to 0.25 grams of soil sample or sample swab. This is an appropriate stopping point and you can store the PowerSoil®-htp Bead Plate at 4°C covered with the Square Well Mat. This is the most time consuming step of the protocol. Care must be taken to avoid cross contamination between sample wells.

steps.title: Add 750 μl of PowerSoil®-htp Bead...
steps.instruction: Add 750 μl of PowerSoil®-htp Bead Solution to the wells of the PowerSoil®-htp Bead Plate. undetermined, PowerSoil®-htp Bead Solution

steps.title: Check Solution C1
steps.instruction: Check Solution C1. If Solution C1 has precipitated, heat solution at 60°C until the precipitate has dissolved. Solution C1 contains SDS. If it gets cold, it will precipitate. Heating at 60°C will dissolve the SDS. Solution C1 can be used while it is still warm. Undetermined, Heating solution

steps.title: Add 60 μl of Solution C1
steps.instruction: Add 60 μl of Solution C1. Secure the Square Well Mat (from step 3) tightly to the plate. undetermined, Solution C1

steps.title: Place sealed plates in 65°C water bath for 10 min
steps.instruction: Place sealed plates in 65°C water bath for 10 min. DO NOT SUBMERGE THE PLATES. Undetermined, Water bath 00:10:00, Water bath

steps.title: Place PowerSoil®-htp Bead Plate between the...
steps.instruction: Place PowerSoil®-htp Bead Plate between the aluminum plate adapters and securely fasten to the 96 Well Plate Shaker.

steps.title: Shake at speed 20 for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Shake at speed 20 for 20 minutes. 00:20:00, Shaking It is important that the plate not rub against any surfaces in the shaker.

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature for 6...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. While centrifuging, aliquot 250 μl of Solution C2 into each well of Plate #1 and cover with Sealing Tape. 00:06:00, Centrifugation The Sealing Tape can be re-used when centrifuging Plate #1 in step 14 if handled carefully. undetermined, Solution C2

steps.title: Remove and discard the Square Well...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the Square Well Mat from the Bead Plate.

steps.title: Carefully remove the Sealing Tape from...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the Sealing Tape from Plate #1 and transfer the supernatant (~ 400-500μl) from the Bead Plate to Plate #1 and pipette up and down 4 times. The supernatant may still contain some particles.

steps.title: Re-apply the Sealing Tape to Plate #1
steps.instruction: Re-apply the Sealing Tape to Plate #1. Incubate at 4°C for 10 minutes. Undetermined, Incubation 00:10:00, Incubation

steps.title: Centrifuge Plate #1 at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Plate #1 at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. While centrifuging, aliquot 200 μl Solution C3 into each well of Plate #3, then cover with Sealing Tape. The Sealing Tape can be re-used when centrifuging Plate #3 in step 16 if handled carefully. 00:06:00, Centrifugation undetermined, Solution C3

steps.title: After centrifugation, carefully remove and discard...
steps.instruction: After centrifugation, carefully remove and discard Sealing Tape from Plate #1.

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire volume (~600 μl depending on sample type) of supernatant in Plate #1 to Plate #2.

steps.title: Apply Sealing Tape to Plate #2...
steps.instruction: Apply Sealing Tape to Plate #2 and centrifuge at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:06:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Carefully remove Sealing Tape from Plate #2 and Plate #3
steps.instruction: Carefully remove Sealing Tape from Plate #2 and Plate #3.

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire volume of supernatant (~600 μl) from Plate #2 to Plate #3 and pipette up and down 4 times.

steps.title: Re-apply Sealing Tape to Plate #3
steps.instruction: Re-apply Sealing Tape to Plate #3. Incubate at 4°C for 10 minutes. Undetermined, Incubation 00:10:00, Incubation

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature for 6...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:06:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Carefully remove and discard Sealing Tape from Plate #3
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard Sealing Tape from Plate #3.

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the entire volume of supernatant (~750 μl) to Plate #4.

steps.title: Apply Sealing Tape to Plate #4...
steps.instruction: Apply Sealing Tape to Plate #4 and centrifuge at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. While centrifuging, add 650 μl of Solution C4 to Plate #5. 00:06:00, Centrifugation undetermined, Solution C4

steps.title: Avoiding any residual pellet, transfer up...
steps.instruction: Avoiding any residual pellet, transfer up to 650 μl of supernatant in Plate #4 to Plate #5.

steps.title: Add a second 650 μl (1300...
steps.instruction: Add a second 650 μl (1300 μl C4 total) aliquot of Solution C4 to each well of Plate #5. It is safe to stop the protocol at this step and store the samples covered with Sealing Tape at 4°C. Make sure to briefly centrifuge the plate to collect any condensate on the plate seal after overnight storage. undetermined, Solution C4

steps.title: Place Spin Plate onto Plate #6
steps.instruction: Place Spin Plate onto Plate #6.

steps.title: Load approximately 650 μl from Plate...
steps.instruction: Load approximately 650 μl from Plate #5 into each well of the Spin Plate and apply Centrifuge Tape.

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature for 5...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature for 5 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:05:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard the flow through and place...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow through and place the Spin Plate back on Plate #6. Carefully remove and discard the Centrifuge Tape.

steps.title: Repeat steps 30-32 until all the supernatant has been processed
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 30-32 until all the supernatant has been processed. Discard the final flow through. go to step #30

steps.title: Place the Spin Plate back on Plate #6
steps.instruction: Place the Spin Plate back on Plate #6.

steps.title: Confirm that ethanol has been added...
steps.instruction: Confirm that ethanol has been added to Solution C5-D (see step 1). Add 500 μl of Solution C5-D to each well of the Spin Plate. Apply Centrifuge Tape to the Spin Plate. undetermined, Solution C5-D

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature for 5...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature for 5 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:05:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard the flow through and place...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow through and place the Spin Plate back on Plate #6.

steps.title: Centrifuge again at room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge again at room temperature for 6 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:06:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Carefully place the Spin Plate onto the Microplate
steps.instruction: Carefully place the Spin Plate onto the Microplate. Remove Centrifuge Tape from the Spin Plate and discard.

steps.title: Add 100 μl of Solution C6...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl of Solution C6 to the center of each well of the Spin Plate. Apply Centrifuge Tape. undetermined, Solution C6

steps.title: Let C6 sit on the filter...
steps.instruction: Let C6 sit on the filter for 10 minutes at room temperature before final centrifugation step. 00:10:00, C6 sit on filter

steps.title: Centrifuge at room temperature for 7...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at room temperature for 7 minutes at 4500 x g. 00:07:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove Centrifuge Tape and discard
steps.instruction: Remove Centrifuge Tape and discard.

steps.title: Cover wells of Microplate with the Elution Sealing Mat provided
steps.instruction: Cover wells of Microplate with the Elution Sealing Mat provided. DNA is now ready for any downstream application. No further steps are required. Prolonged storage at 4°C will result in the evaporation of eluted DNA. We recommend storing DNA frozen (-20°C or -80°C). Solution C6 does not contain EDTA. To concentrate the DNA see the Hints and Troubleshooting Guide provided in the MoBio protocol.
